LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT -- OFF CALENDAR, FOR FAILURE TO PROVIDE SUFFICIENT PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT IS TREATING PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION ONLY AS A NOTICE OF OBJECTION TO SEVICE AND IS NOT CONSIDERING THE INADMISSIBLE UNSUPPORTED STATEMENTS THEREIN. CHICAGO TITLE CO.'S PROOF OF SERVICE DOES NOT ADEQUATELY DEMONSTRATE EITHER MAILING OR PERSONAL SERVICE OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR# 1558.

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-01-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT -- OFF CALENDAR, for failure to provide sufficient proof of service. The Court is treating plaintiff's opposition only as a notice of objection to sevice and is not considering the inadmissible unsupported statements therein. Chicago Title Co.'s proof of service does not adequately demonstrate either mailing or personal service of the moving papers. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
